JEREMY JESSUP APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS OLENA BARANOVA AND JAMES MORTON. THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/22/13 IS CONTINUED TO 3/11/13 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES. EXPERT DISCOVERY SHALL BE GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
